PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS-HOLDMAN, CONSTANCE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MARSHALL, ALICIA AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS-HOLDMAN, CONSTANCE HOLDMAN, BILLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLTFF'S EXHIBITS RETURNED,C/O MOTHER:ROSA STIDHAM, W/AUTH.LETTER.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-27-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-27-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PARTIES WILL NOT STIPULATE TO A PRO TEM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS-HOLDMAN, CONSTANCE HOLDMAN, BILLY ALTHOUGH THE TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY PLAINTIFF MAY BE SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH A PRIVATE NUISANCE, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF'S PROPER REMEDY WOULD BE AN INJUNCTION. HOWEVER, THE SMALL CLAIMS COURT DOES NOT HAVE THE POWER TO GRANT INJUNCTIVE RELIEF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
